entries.name: Verifier
entries.description: PLONK verifier used to validate aggregated L2 block proofs and zero-knowledge exit proofs.

entries.name: UpgradeGatekeeper
entries.description: Controls upgrades to managed contracts. The master can schedule, cancel, and complete upgrades after the main contract's notice period.

entries.name: ZkLink Main
entries.description: The main rollup contract. It processes L2 blocks submitted by validators, handles deposits and withdrawals, and synchronizes block data with other zkLink chains.

ALL_CHAINS.description: Bitmask of zkLink chain IDs participating in the network.

DEFAULT_FEE_ADDRESS.description: Default fee account in the zkLink state.

syncServices.description: Cross-chain synchronization services, indexed by zkLink chain ID.

validators.description: Addresses authorized to commit, execute, and revert L2 blocks, and send block confirmations to other zkLink chains.

exodusMode.description: Whether permanent exodus mode is active, allowing users to exit their funds.

gateway.description: L2 gateway used to communicate with L1; unset on the L1 chain.

getMaster.description: Address authorized to change the proxy implementation and transfer mastership.

getNoticePeriod.description: Delay before a scheduled upgrade can be completed.

isReadyForUpgrade.description: Whether the contract permits an upgrade to be completed; false in exodus mode.

MASTER_CHAIN_ID.description: zkLink chain ID of the master chain.

networkGovernor.description: Address authorized to manage validators, tokens, gateways, and cross-chain synchronization services.

periphery.description: Delegatecall target containing functionality split from the main contract because of code-size limits.

verifier.description: Verifier used to validate aggregated block proofs and exit proofs.

receivedPermissions.description: commit, execute, and revert L2 blocks, and send block confirmations to other zkLink chains.
add tokens, pause and unpause token deposits.
change the network governor, validator set, L1 gateway and cross-chain synchronization services.

entries.name: LayerZeroBridge
entries.description: A LayerZero bridge that relays synchronization hashes and block confirmations between zkLink chains.

ALL_CHAINS.description: Bitmask of zkLink chain IDs participating in the network.

DEFAULT_FEE_ADDRESS.description: Default fee account in the zkLink state.

endpoint.description: LayerZero endpoint used to send and receive cross-chain messages.

MASTER_CHAIN_ID.description: zkLink chain ID of the master chain.

zklink.description: Associated zkLink contract authorized to send synchronization hashes and block confirmations.

receivedPermissions.description: commit, execute, and revert L2 blocks, and send block confirmations to other zkLink chains.
add tokens, pause and unpause token deposits.
change the network governor, validator set, L1 gateway and cross-chain synchronization services.
